html:
• Restack with gt restack to sync REV-13054 before continuing review on the Chameleon navigation feature.
  • Request approvals on the final 3 PRs of the Numeric Table Sorting stack (REV-13297), starting with #20889 — 2 are already approved.
  • Clear bot feedback on #20953 (3 comments) to unblock the REV-13328 error-message refactor stack.
  • Respond to 4 bot comments on #20963 to move the REV-13461 prompt-chip feature toward approval.
  • Pick up REV-13469 (Export session as report) from untouched Jira to start a new parallel workstream.
